    <style>
      .profile-insight-link {
        text-decoration: none;
        color: inherit;
    }

    .profile-insight-link:focus-visible {
        outline: 2px solid #1f74ff;
        outline-offset: 2px;
        border-radius: 999px;
    }

    .community-actions-menu-wrapper {
        position: relative;
    }

    .community-actions-menu-button-mobile {
        display: none;
    }

    .community-actions-menu {
        position: absolute;
        right: 0;
        top: calc(100% + 6px);
        min-width: 180px;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        border-radius: 8px;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        padding: 6px 0;
        display: none;
        z-index: 50;
    }

    .community-actions-menu.is-open {
        display: block;
    }

    .community-actions-menu button {
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        background: none;
        border: 0;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: #111827;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .community-actions-menu button:hover {
        background: #f3f4f6;
    }

    #user-profile-header-contextual-menu-button svg {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        fill: currentColor;
        display: block;
    }

    .community-actions-menu-button-mobile svg {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        fill: currentColor;
        display: block;
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .actions-container.actions-desktop {
            width: 100%;
        }

        .mobile-join-actions .buttons-show-on-desktop {
            width: 100%;
            flex-wrap: nowrap;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .mobile-join-actions .button-container {
            flex: 1 1 auto;
            min-width: 0;
        }

        .mobile-join-actions .community-actions-menu-wrapper {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
        }

        .mobile-join-actions #user-profile-header-contextual-menu-button {
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
        }

        .community-actions-menu-button-desktop {
            display: none;
        }

        .community-actions-menu-button-mobile {
            display: inline-flex;
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
        }
    }

    .announcement-context-menu {
        position: absolute;
        right: 0;
        top: calc(100% + 6px);
        min-width: 160px;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        border-radius: 8px;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        padding: 6px 0;
        display: none;
        z-index: 60;
    }

    .announcement-context-menu.is-open {
        display: block;
    }

    .announcement-context-menu button {
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        background: none;
        border: 0;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: #111827;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .announcement-context-menu button:hover {
        background: #f3f4f6;
    }

    .announcement-display-context-menu {
        position: relative;
    }

    .reaction-button svg {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        fill: currentColor;
    }

    .reaction-button {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 6px 10px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: #f3f4f6;
        color: #111827;
        font-size: 12px;
        line-height: 1;
    }

    .reaction-button .reaction-icon {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
        margin-right: 6px;
        display: inline-block;
        vertical-align: middle;
    }
    </style>

    </style>

    </style>

    </style>

    <script type="text/javascript">
      $(function(){
        function trackReturns() {
            function dayDiff(d1, d2) {
                return Math.floor((d1-d2)/86400000);
            }
            if (!localStorage) {
                return false;
            }

            var cookieName = &#39;RBXReturn&#39;;
            var cookieOptions = {expires:9001};
            var cookieStr = localStorage.getItem(cookieName) || &#34;&#34;;
            var cookie = {};

            try {
                cookie = JSON.parse(cookieStr);
            } catch (ex) {
                // busted cookie string from old previous version of the code
            }

            try {
                if (typeof cookie.ts === &#34;undefined&#34; || isNaN(new Date(cookie.ts))) {
                    localStorage.setItem(cookieName, JSON.stringify({ ts: new Date().toDateString() }));
                    return false;
                }
            } catch (ex) {
                return false;
            }

            var daysSinceFirstVisit = dayDiff(new Date(), new Date(cookie.ts));
            if (daysSinceFirstVisit == 1 &amp;&amp; typeof cookie.odr === &#34;undefined&#34;) {
                RobloxEventManager.triggerEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_odr&#39;, {});
                cookie.odr = 1;
            }
            if (daysSinceFirstVisit &gt;= 1 &amp;&amp; daysSinceFirstVisit &lt;= 7 &amp;&amp; typeof cookie.sdr === &#34;undefined&#34;) {
                RobloxEventManager.triggerEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_sdr&#39;, {});
                cookie.sdr = 1;
            }
            try {
                localStorage.setItem(cookieName, JSON.stringify(cookie));
            } catch (ex) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        GoogleListener.init();



        RobloxEventManager.initialize(true);
        RobloxEventManager.triggerEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_pageview&#39;);
        trackReturns();
        

        RobloxEventManager._idleInterval = 450000;
        RobloxEventManager.registerCookieStoreEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_initial_install_start&#39;);
        RobloxEventManager.registerCookieStoreEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_ftp&#39;);
        RobloxEventManager.registerCookieStoreEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_initial_install_success&#39;);
        RobloxEventManager.registerCookieStoreEvent(&#39;rbx_evt_fmp&#39;);
        
    });
    </script>
    <script>
      document.addEventListener(&#34;DOMContentLoaded&#34;, function () {
        var menuButton = document.getElementById(&#34;user-profile-header-contextual-menu-button&#34;);
        var menu = document.getElementById(&#34;community-actions-menu&#34;);
        var viewMembers = document.getElementById(&#34;community-action-members&#34;);
        var copyLink = document.getElementById(&#34;community-action-copy&#34;);

        if (!menuButton || !menu) {
            return;
        }

        var closeMenu = function () {
            menu.classList.remove(&#34;is-open&#34;);
            menuButton.setAttribute(&#34;aria-expanded&#34;, &#34;false&#34;);
            menu.setAttribute(&#34;aria-hidden&#34;, &#34;true&#34;);
        };

        menuButton.addEventListener(&#34;click&#34;, function (event) {
            event.stopPropagation();
            var isOpen = menu.classList.toggle(&#34;is-open&#34;);
            menuButton.setAttribute(&#34;aria-expanded&#34;, isOpen ? &#34;true&#34; : &#34;false&#34;);
            menu.setAttribute(&#34;aria-hidden&#34;, isOpen ? &#34;false&#34; : &#34;true&#34;);
        });

        document.addEventListener(&#34;click&#34;, function () {
            closeMenu();
        });

        document.addEventListener(&#34;keydown&#34;, function (event) {
            if (event.key === &#34;Escape&#34;) {
                closeMenu();
            }
        });

        if (viewMembers) {
            viewMembers.addEventListener(&#34;click&#34;, function () {
                closeMenu();
                var target = document.getElementById(&#34;members-section&#34;);
                if (target) {
                    target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: &#34;smooth&#34;, block: &#34;start&#34; });
                }
            });
        }

        if (copyLink) {
            copyLink.addEventListener(&#34;click&#34;, function () {
                closeMenu();
                var url = window.location.href;
                if (navigator.clipboard &amp;&amp; navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
                    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).catch(function () {});
                } else {
                    var temp = document.createElement(&#34;input&#34;);
                    temp.value = url;
                    document.body.appendChild(temp);
                    temp.select();
                    try {
                        document.execCommand(&#34;copy&#34;);
                    } catch (e) {
                    }
                    document.body.removeChild(temp);
                }
            });
        }
    });
    </script>

    <script onerror="Roblox.BundleDetector &amp;&amp; Roblox.BundleDetector.reportBundleError(this)" data-monitor="true" data-bundlename="pageEnd" type="text/javascript" src="https://js.rbxcdn.com/4a188603304fc1d5a6ad7ba49234be7f.js">
    </script>
    <script>
      document.addEventListener(&#39;DOMContentLoaded&#39;, function() {
  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll(&#39;#horizontal-tabs li&#39;);
    const membersSection = document.querySelector(&#39;group-members-list .section&#39;) || document.querySelector(&#39;.group-members-list&#39;);
    const announcements = document.getElementById(&#39;group-announcements&#39;);
    const announcementMenuButton = document.getElementById(&#39;announcement-context-menu-button&#39;);
    const announcementMenu = document.getElementById(&#39;announcement-context-menu&#39;);
  const tabContent = document.querySelector(&#39;.rbx-tab-content&#39;);
  if (!tabs.length || !tabContent) return;

  const placeholder = document.createElement(&#39;div&#39;);
  placeholder.id = &#39;tab-placeholder&#39;;
  placeholder.className = &#39;section-content text-center text-muted&#39;;
  placeholder.style.display = &#39;none&#39;;
  tabContent.appendChild(placeholder);

  const setTab = (tabId) =&gt; {
    const showMembers = (tabId || &#39;&#39;).toLowerCase() === &#39;about&#39;;
    if (membersSection) membersSection.style.display = showMembers ? &#39;&#39; : &#39;none&#39;;
    if (announcements) announcements.style.display = showMembers ? &#39;&#39; : &#39;none&#39;;
    placeholder.textContent = showMembers ? &#39;&#39; : `There is no ${tabId} in this community`;
    placeholder.style.display = showMembers ? &#39;none&#39; : &#39;block&#39;;
  };

  tabs.forEach((li) =&gt; li.addEventListener(&#39;click&#39;, () =&gt; setTab(li.id || &#39;&#39;)));
  const active = document.querySelector(&#39;#horizontal-tabs li.active&#39;);
  setTab(active ? (active.id || &#39;about&#39;) : &#39;about&#39;);

    if (announcementMenuButton &amp;&amp; announcementMenu) {
        const closeAnnouncementMenu = () =&gt; {
            announcementMenu.classList.remove(&#39;is-open&#39;);
            announcementMenuButton.setAttribute(&#39;aria-expanded&#39;, &#39;false&#39;);
        };

        announcementMenuButton.addEventListener(&#39;click&#39;, (event) =&gt; {
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            announcementMenu.classList.toggle(&#39;is-open&#39;);
            announcementMenuButton.setAttribute(&#39;aria-expanded&#39;, announcementMenu.classList.contains(&#39;is-open&#39;) ? &#39;true&#39; : &#39;false&#39;);
        });

        document.addEventListener(&#39;click&#39;, (event) =&gt; {
            if (!announcementMenu.contains(event.target) &amp;&amp; !announcementMenuButton.contains(event.target)) {
                closeAnnouncementMenu();
            }
        });

        document.addEventListener(&#39;keydown&#39;, (event) =&gt; {
            if (event.key === &#39;Escape&#39;) {
                closeAnnouncementMenu();
            }
        });
    }

  // Move join actions below description on mobile
  const description = document.querySelector(&#39;.description-container&#39;);
  const actions = document.querySelector(&#39;.actions-container&#39;);
  if (description &amp;&amp; actions) {
    const style = document.createElement(&#39;style&#39;);
    style.textContent = `
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .mobile-join-actions { width: 100%; margin-top: 12px; }
        .mobile-join-actions .buttons-show-on-desktop { width: 100%; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .mobile-join-actions .button-container { flex: 1 1 100%; }
        .mobile-join-actions button { width: 100%; }
      }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);

    const moveActionsBelowDescription = () =&gt; {
      if (window.matchMedia(&#39;(max-width: 768px)&#39;).matches) {
        if (!actions.classList.contains(&#39;mobile-join-actions&#39;) &amp;&amp; description.parentNode) {
          description.parentNode.insertBefore(actions, description.nextSibling);
          actions.classList.add(&#39;mobile-join-actions&#39;);
        }
      }
    };

    moveActionsBelowDescription();
    window.addEventListener(&#39;resize&#39;, moveActionsBelowDescription);
  }
});
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
